info.title: PurviewDataAccess
info.description: Creates a data plane client for Purview Data Access.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.description: The endpoint of the Purview Data Access service. Example: https://api.purview-service.microsoft.com/

Action.description: An action step in a workflow.

actionId.description: The unique identifier of the action.

ApproverDecision.description: Approver decision on a workflow run.

dataAssets.description: Data assets included in the decision.

ApproverDecisionStatus.description: The status of an approver's decision.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

message.description: A human-readable representation of the error.

details.description: An array of details about specific errors that led to this reported error.

innererror.description: An object containing more specific information than the current object about the error.

Azure.Core.Foundations.InnerError.description: An object containing more specific information about the error. As per Azure REST API guidelines - https://aka.ms/AzureRestApiGuidelines#handling-errors.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

DataAssetValues.description: Data asset values included in a subscription.

dataAccessGrantors.description: The list of data access grantors.

sensitiveMarkers.description: Sensitive markers applied to the data product.

termsOfUseRequired.description: Whether terms of use acceptance is required.

partnerSharingPermitted.description: Whether sharing with partners is permitted.

customerSharingPermitted.description: Whether sharing with customers is permitted.

privacyComplianceApprovalRequired.description: Whether privacy compliance approval is required.

skipWorkflow.description: Whether the workflow can be skipped.

DataProductWorkflowSettingsResponse.description: Response with workflow settings for a data product.

skipWorkflowEnabled.description: Whether the skip workflow option is enabled.

DataSubscription.description: Represents a data access subscription request.

dataSubscriptionId.description: The unique identifier of the data subscription.

useWorkflow.description: Whether this subscription uses a workflow.

workflowId.description: The workflow identifier associated with this subscription.

dataProductName.description: The name of the data product.

businessDomainName.description: The name of the business domain.

globalComment.description: A general comment for the subscription.

policySetValues.description: Policy set values for the subscription.

createdBy.description: The user who created the subscription.

accessDecisionDate.description: The date when the access decision was made.

dataAssets.description: The data assets included in the subscription.

accessProviders.description: The list of access provider identifiers.

DataSubscriptionPolicySetValues.description: Policy set values associated with a data subscription.

useCases.description: The use cases for the subscription.

DataSubscriptionStatus.description: The status of a data subscription.

Identity.description: Identity information for a user or group.

objectId.description: The object ID of the identity.

tenantId.description: The tenant ID of the identity.

displayName.description: The display name of the identity.

email.description: The email address of the identity.

value.description: The DataSubscription items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

value.description: The Workflow items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

PolicySet.description: Represents an access policy set applied to a resource.

policySetId.description: The unique identifier of the policy set.

targetResource.description: The target resource for the policy set.

PublishWorkflowEnabledResponse.description: Response indicating whether a publish workflow is enabled.

exists.description: Whether an enabled publish workflow exists.

TargetResource.description: The target resource for a policy set.

Trigger.description: A trigger that activates a workflow.

TriggerType.description: The type of trigger that activates a workflow.

values.name: DataAccessRequestSubmitted
values.description: Triggered when a data access request is submitted.

values.name: DataProductPublish
values.description: Triggered when a data product is published.

values.name: TermPublish
values.description: Triggered when a term is published.

Workflow.description: Represents a data access workflow definition.

workflowId.description: The unique identifier of the workflow.

triggers.description: The triggers that activate this workflow.

actionDag.description: The action DAG (directed acyclic graph) defining the workflow steps.

createdBy.description: The user who created the workflow.

lastModifiedBy.description: The user who last modified the workflow.

accessProviders.description: The list of access provider identifiers.

workflowRunId.description: The unique identifier of the workflow run.

status.description: The status of the workflow run.

workflowRunName.description: The name of the workflow run.

actionDag.description: The action DAG for this run.

createdBy.description: The user who created the run.

modifiedBy.description: The user who last modified the run.

WorkflowRunApproval.description: Represents an approval record for a workflow run.

approvalId.description: The unique identifier of the approval.

decision.description: The decision made on this approval.

decisionDate.description: The date the approval decision was made.

value.description: The list of workflow run approvals.

WorkflowRunInProgressResponse.description: Response indicating whether a workflow run is in progress.

inProgress.description: Whether a workflow run is currently in progress.

Azure.Core.Foundations.ApiVersionParamet.name: api-version
Azure.Core.Foundations.ApiVersionParamet.description: The API version to use for this operation.
